## **¶**前言

经常有人问我用什么Markdown编辑器，那我肯定是强推我一直使用的[Typora](https://typora.io/)。

![](https://bu.dusays.com/2024/06/13/666a8d4de3929.png)

说起来Typora这款软件我在它免费时期便开始使用了，也是我最早接触markdown语法的地方。不过现在，由于收费的缘故，让很多人用这款软件都有了门槛。但是最近，我在Github找到了一款开源项目，它可以一键免费激活你的Typora。

## **¶**项目简介

### 项目地址：

[https://github.com/743859910/Typora_Unlocker](https://github.com/743859910/Typora_Unlocker)

[https://743859910.github.io/Typora_Unlocker](https://743859910.github.io/Typora_Unlocker)

![](https://bu.dusays.com/2024/06/13/666a8c1f86ce5.png)

### 支持的操作系统：

✅Linux

✅Windows

❌Mac

## **¶**使用方法

*您可以通过访问*[*Github仓库*](https://github.com/743859910/Typora_Unlocker)*或*[*本项目官网*](https://743859910.github.io/Typora_Unlocker/)*查看使用方法*

### 以下为转载的程序[README.MD](https://github.com/743859910/Typora_Unlocker/blob/master/README.md)内容

> Typora 官网：[https://typora.io/](https://typora.io/)
>
> Typora 中国官网：[https://typoraio.cn/](https://typoraio.cn/)
>
> Typora_Unlocker 支持的版本：| 1.0.0 - 1.8.10 |
>
> 蓝奏云：[https://www.lanzouy.com/b00rnjxib](https://www.lanzouy.com/b00rnjxib)
>
> 如链接打不开，可将lanzouy中的y用26个英文字母中的任意一个替换即可。
>
> 密码：1234
>
> ---
>
> 打开蓝奏云网盘，输入密码：1234 点确认。[![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/c54f80444aff8dea387f15a6cb08b7f1ea94d245ac040878e368451e7367021b/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f302e77656270)](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/c54f80444aff8dea387f15a6cb08b7f1ea94d245ac040878e368451e7367021b/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f302e77656270)
>
> 以 Windows 版为例[![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/ceb5b349bef5fd59955fa30832b6039df341521db0910e6b9c8b6d4dfa7abdb8/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f312e77656270)](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/ceb5b349bef5fd59955fa30832b6039df341521db0910e6b9c8b6d4dfa7abdb8/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f312e77656270)
>
> 选择普通下载即可[![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/038a6b9cc2763be6722c97970d2e9eb25095b685712e897378fdbae1f4ad76ce/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f322e77656270)](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/038a6b9cc2763be6722c97970d2e9eb25095b685712e897378fdbae1f4ad76ce/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f322e77656270)
>
> 将下载好的压缩包文件解压后得到的 node_inject.exe 和 license-gen.exe 文件[![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/2b815eb93fc8d03a7350019b52ad3a07615b7af88275dae24b9e3e92ae4e7f42/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f332e77656270)](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/2b815eb93fc8d03a7350019b52ad3a07615b7af88275dae24b9e3e92ae4e7f42/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f332e77656270)
>
> 复制粘贴到Typora的安装目录[![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/8a229cb5e754beae610b2cb70d0325105a7d613bedf50f215e92d8750d629c43/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f342e77656270)](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/8a229cb5e754beae610b2cb70d0325105a7d613bedf50f215e92d8750d629c43/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f342e77656270)
>
> 在 Typora 安装目录的地址栏输入 cmd 后，按 Enter键[![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/c9b642bcdda8f79f175ca4d53282991b24da8b703bffb36211bf662fe53c164b/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f352e77656270)](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/c9b642bcdda8f79f175ca4d53282991b24da8b703bffb36211bf662fe53c164b/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f352e77656270)
>
> 输入 node_inject.exe 按 Enter键 即可自动处理，然后输入 license-gen.exe 按 Enter键
>  即可得到序列号。[![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/62f375e073622a6ea3194cf96e283539ae61608acb2c84e3274bf8eb380c5f99/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f362e77656270)](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/62f375e073622a6ea3194cf96e283539ae61608acb2c84e3274bf8eb380c5f99/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f362e77656270)
>
> 鼠标移动至序列号上双击鼠标左键，然后同时按住 Ctrl+Shift+C 键即可复制序列号。[![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/01c92a6227648be6f139c3527a90aa8ba1eb02dc6e0ca49a8243b0030e172ead/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f372e77656270)](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/01c92a6227648be6f139c3527a90aa8ba1eb02dc6e0ca49a8243b0030e172ead/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f372e77656270)
>
> 打开 Typora 点击：输入序列号[![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/46de6ced890a6cbdfa91db8070b7f55216cdb5173085a616b83adfa4ae055c2b/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f382e77656270)](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/46de6ced890a6cbdfa91db8070b7f55216cdb5173085a616b83adfa4ae055c2b/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f382e77656270)
>
> 邮箱地址随意输入即可，然后输入刚才复制的序列号后点击：激活[![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/4f3bf448cb3fbd73f64471043654c8cfab068e7d28ea5def52f97ad22f8787b3/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f392e77656270)](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/4f3bf448cb3fbd73f64471043654c8cfab068e7d28ea5def52f97ad22f8787b3/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f392e77656270)
>
> 然后就会看到 Typora 已激活[![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/ee30f07984b3753a6e8539e89892f02d160eceeeff238d8042ed628995343bdb/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f31302e77656270)](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/ee30f07984b3753a6e8539e89892f02d160eceeeff238d8042ed628995343bdb/68747470733a2f2f7261772e6769746d6972726f722e636f6d2f3734333835393931302f5479706f72615f556e6c6f636b65722f6d61737465722f696d672f5479706f72615f31302e77656270)
